meaning: n.听力学(主要研究对听力受损者的治疗方法)
examples: He has strong interests in audiology study.
They were assessed by audiology and aural image before surgery.
Eric has been endeavoring to study audiology because his dream is to be an audiologist.
"Music-induced hearing loss is preventable, " said Dr. Gail Gudmundsen, Managing Director, Audiology Division, at Etymotic.
